messages.content: Hi, can you please make the following sentence sound less aggressive? : Why do we need Mykaela to sort this application? Can this be done virtually?
Is it possible to sort this application virtually, or is Mykaela's assistance required for this task?
I wasn’t involved in this so just trying to understand why we need Mykaela to sort this application? Possible to sort this virtually?
I'm not familiar with the details, but I'm curious as to why Mykaela's assistance is necessary for sorting this application. Would it be possible to handle this virtually instead?

can you please check the grammar of the following sentence: Unfortunately Chris is not available on the 10th, so we will just go through the pension forms together that day and continue with legal and other agenda in the following meeting if that is agreeable with you.
The grammar of the sentence is correct.

can you please check the following email to see if there are any errors and if it reads smoothly?: Hope your week is going well. 

IA advised us that changing the policy structure from First to Die to Last to Die is only allowed in the first 13 months from the policy issue date. Since this timeframe had long passed, they are not able accommodate the change. 

However, we could consider dissolving the first to die and split the policy into two single life policies on both of you. We are looking at the logistic of this dissolution as well as the tax implication. I will be able to get back to you sometime next week once I receive all the necessary information from IA. 

I understand that this is not exactly the same outcome, but splitting into two policies is the closest we could do to achieve your goal at this moment.

Hope your week is going well! 

I wanted to update you on the policy structure change request. IA has informed us that changing the policy from First to Die to Last to Die is only possible within the first 13 months from the policy issue date. Unfortunately, this timeframe has already passed, so accommodating the change is not feasible.

However, we could explore an alternative solution by dissolving the first to die and splitting the policy into two single life policies for both of you. We are currently examining the logistics of this dissolution as well as the potential tax implications. I will provide you with a more detailed update by next week once I have obtained all the necessary information from IA.

I understand that this proposed solution may not align exactly with your initial request, but splitting the policy into two is the closest option we have to achieving your goal at this moment.

Let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

can you please improve the following sentence?: I’m waiting for single quotes on Colleen including Manulife. Sun Life might be better than Manu on CDA. I need to check the numbers first to find out if it’s worth bothering Colleen for another signature on Manulife app.

I am currently awaiting quotations for Colleen, including one from Manulife. It's possible that Sun Life might offer better terms than Manulife in relation to the CDA. Before reaching out to Colleen for another signature on the Manulife application, I need to assess the numbers to determine if it is worthwhile.
is this sentence grammatically correct? : Thank you for your understanding. We can certainly schedule a meeting to discuss further once I have more detailed information.
Yes, the sentence is grammatically correct.
how about this sentence? :Thank you for your email and the spreadsheet. This is indeed very helpful information. We will also update your net worth statement accordingly.
Yes, the sentence is grammatically correct.

Thank you for your email. 

I will send the necessary form for TFSA contribution via DocuSign. Would it be okay to use the same banking information you have provided me previously for RRSP contribution? 

I’d suggest we secure a couple of meetings in October while Sheri is in town and discuss items you mentioned in your email. Emily will send you some options for our meeting date and time. 

Have a safe back to Calgary and can’t wait to hear all about your property hunting.

Thank you for your email.

I will send the required form for TFSA contribution via DocuSign. Is it acceptable to utilize the same banking information you previously provided for the RRSP contribution?

I suggest arranging a couple of meetings in October while Sheri is in town to address the matters you mentioned in your email. Emily will forward you some options for the meeting date and time.

Have a safe trip back to Calgary, and I am eagerly looking forward to hearing about your property hunting experiences.

can you please check the grammar?: I will ask Emily to courier the Manulife application to you tomorrow. It’s already pre-filled based on the info Colleen provided, assuming nothing had changed since we submitted the other apps.

I will request Emily to send the Manulife application to you via courier tomorrow. It is already pre-filled using the information provided by Colleen, assuming there have been no changes since the submission of the other applications.

can you please check the following email and improve? : It was nice meeting you yesterday. 

As promised, please find attached spreadsheets we reviewed together in the meeting. In preparation of our next meeting, please provide me with the following information: 

-	Desired retirement age
-	Desired retirement gross annual income
-	Estimated CPP and OAS amount
-	Other income source during retirement (private pension, rental income etc.)

Brooke from our team will reach out to you to schedule the next couple of meetings.

It was a pleasure meeting with you yesterday. 

As per our discussion, I have attached the spreadsheets we reviewed during our meeting. In order to prepare for our upcoming sessions, kindly provide me with the following details:

- Desired retirement age
- Desired gross annual income during retirement
- Estimated amounts for CPP and OAS
- Any other sources of income anticipated during retirement (such as private pensions, rental income, etc.)

Brooke from our team will contact you shortly to arrange the next few meetings. 

Thank you once again, and I look forward to our future discussions.

Hi, can you please check the grammar of the following sentence: Martine and I had a conversation this morning and we are strongly leaning towards the termination. We would like you to join me in the termination meeting, so we wanted to check your availability in the next few days. Please let me know.
The grammar of the sentence is correct.
does it read smoothly?
Yes, the sentence reads smoothly.
